title: dig connector configuration
description: ACTIVE DNS lookup (dig). The query target is supplied per-run via the authorized scope, not the stored config; this config carries only optional instance-level limits.

dataset.title: Dataset
dataset.description: Optional dataset label used in the provenance source_id.

timeout.title: Timeout (seconds)
timeout.description: Optional hard wall-clock bound on the dig subprocess, in seconds.

allowed_targets.title: Allowed targets
allowed_targets.description: Optional exact-match allowlist (ADR 0072 §2): if non-empty, an operator run is refused unless its scope target is in this list. Empty/absent means any valid target (the per-run scope token stays the primary authorization).
